---
title: "Review: Prenatal Exposure"
subtitle: asdf asf asdfa
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: [simple, ../css/custom.scss]
author: Sungjun Park
date: 2026-03-05
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ../csl/jama.csl
---

---

::: {.callout-note}

### test

test test test

:::

## Methods

## Data Source

## Study Population

> 바보

```{r}

1 + 1

```
